name: Holiday Loaf (Helen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice: Combine 7/8 cup cooked brown rice and 1/8 cup cooked wild rice with 2 cups boiling water in a rice cooker or pot. Cook according to package instructions.
2. Make cashew milk: Blend 1/2 cup raw cashews with 1/2 cup water until smooth.
3. Dissolve egg replacer in water: Mix 6 tsp egg replacer with 4 tbsp water until well combined.
4. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix thoroughly.
5. Press the mixture firmly into a nonstick loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
7. Place a serving plate on top of the loaf pan and gently turn it over to release the loaf onto the plate.
8. Serve with mushroom gravy, prepared separately.
9. Helpful hints: This recipe makes excellent stuffing and can also be served as "sloppy Joes" covered in marinara sauce. The Holiday Loaf is best reserved for special occasions like Thanksgiving due to its rich and indulgent nature.
